---
title: "Data Project" 
about:
  template: jolla  # jolla  trestles  solana  marquee  broadside
  image: img/profile.png
  image-width: 16em
  image-shape: round # rectangle  round  rounded
  
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Resumé
      href: resume-example.pdf
      target: _blank
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:enm5@geneseo.edu
---


Erin Mansfield majors in Accounting at SUNY Geneseo. She also has a minor in Data Analytics. When not working on data analytics, she enjoys reading. 

## Education

State University of New York at Geneseo | Geneseo, NY <br>
B.S. in Accounting | Aug 2023 - May 2026 <br>
Minor in Data Analytics

## Experience

Chautauqua Institution | Drescher and Malecki- Staff Auditor | May 2026 - current
